steps.title: Use the work clues
steps.content: The sentence says fossil excavation can take weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work. The blank needs a word for a demanding process, not for cost, speed, or frequency.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice A, cheap, is about cost; Choice C, rapid, contradicts weeks or months; Choice D, common, is about frequency. Choice B, difficult, matches hard, physically tiring work. The answer is B.
